scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: npx pnpm run typecheck && npx pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:hostinger: PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ npx pnpm --filter @workspace/ai-money-hub run build && npx pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node scripts/copy-client-dist.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npx pnpm run typecheck:libs && npx pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
